name: markora-ui
description: Optional default UI overlays for Markora.
author: Kevin Wang

scripts.build: node ./scripts/cleanDist.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/copyStyles.mjs && node ../../scripts/fix-node-esm-specifiers.mjs dist
scripts.prepack: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run smoke:node-esm
scripts.smoke:node-esm: node --input-type=module -e "const mod = await import('./dist/index.js'); if (typeof mod.createDefaultUi !== 'function') throw new Error('createDefaultUi export missing');"
